title: More Craftable Items
description: A simple mod that allows you to craft items that are otherwise impossible to create in regular survival.
body:
Ever wanted to craft a sponge or a end rod? now you can with this brand new mod, adding a bunch of recipes for a bunch of items that aren't posible to craft in vanilla survival, have fun finding out the rest of them since there's a total of 31 compatible items so enjoy your new experience.

## Description:
- We tried to do this mod vanilla friendly.


## **Item's new recipes:**
- Bell.
- String.
- Spider Web.
- Glowberry.
- Latern, Campfire, Torch can be converted to their soulsand variants by just placing the soulsand block below them on the crafting table.
- Totem of Undying.
- Snowball (Alt Recipe).
- Trident.
- Both Nether and regular Brick blocks can be converted to their item form.
- Redstone.
- Sponge.
- End Rod.
- Saddle.
- Nametag.
- Magma Block (Blast Furnance).
- Grass Block.
- Big Dripleaf.
- Pointed Dripstone.
- Bee Nest.
- Budding Amethist.
- Chainmail Armor set.
